cards.front: What is the primary approach for forecasting time series data using deep learning?
cards.back: Recurrent neural networks (RNNs) and long short-term memory (LSTM) networks are commonly used for this purpose

cards.front: What type of architecture is suitable for time series forecasting?
cards.back: LSTM networks, GRU networks, and Prophet are popular architectures for time series forecasting

cards.front: How can hyperparameters be optimized for deep learning models in time series forecasting?
cards.back: Hyperparameter tuning using techniques like grid search, random search, and Bayesian optimization can be employed

cards.front: What is the role of attention mechanisms in deep learning models for time series forecasting?
cards.back: Attention mechanisms can help focus on relevant information in the input sequence and improve forecasting accuracy

cards.front: What is the difference between autoregressive integrated moving average (ARIMA) models and deep learning models for time series forecasting?
cards.back: ARIMA models use statistical methods to forecast time series data, while deep learning models use neural networks to learn patterns and relationships
